SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr

Interface WindowFrameBound

All Known Implementing Classes:
WindowFrameBound.CurrentRow, WindowFrameBound.Following, WindowFrameBound.Preceding
public sealed interface WindowFrameBound permits WindowFrameBound.CurrentRow, WindowFrameBound.Preceding, WindowFrameBound.Following
A window frame boundary, corresponding to DataFusion's WindowFrameBound.

A null value in WindowFrameBound.Preceding or WindowFrameBound.Following represents an unbounded boundary.

Example: 

WindowFrameBound current = new WindowFrameBound.CurrentRow();
WindowFrameBound unboundedPreceding = new WindowFrameBound.Preceding(null);
WindowFrameBound fiveFollowing = new WindowFrameBound.Following(ScalarValue.ofInt64(5L));
See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: WindowFrameBound
